verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Make we talk about Jesus, The King of kings, e be am, The Lord of lords, supreme, Throughout eternity; The Great I AM, the Way, The Truth, the Life, the Door, Make we talk about Jesus more and more.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Make we talk about Jesus, Make all the world talk am. The power and majesty Of such a wonderful name. The Babe of Bethlehem, The Bright and Morning Star, Make we sing His praise near and far.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Make we talk about Jesus, The Bread of Life, e be am, The Saviour of the world, The Man of Galilee. The Prophet, Priest and King, The Mighty God, e be am, The well of Living Water free.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Make we talk about Jesus, The Prince of Peace, e be am, The Great Physician too, Down through all history. The Lily pure and white, The Rose of Sharon fair, The Shepherd of such tender care.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Make we talk about Jesus, The Rock of Ages, e be am, The Lamb for sinners slain, That Man of Calvary. The Great Emmanuel, The word of God, sublime, E be our Bridegroom so divine.
